Bus Timings

DA2 Bus Timetable PDF - DAMAC Hills and Dubai Studio City

October 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s public transport network continues to expand, offering residents and visitors efficient and affordable ways to navigate the city. One such route is the DA2 Bus, connecting DAMAC Hills and Dubai Studio City. This service is an essential link for commuters, shoppers, and leisure travelers, providing convenient access to key residential and commercial hubs. In this article, we’ll explore the DA2 Bus route, detailing its operational schedule, key stops, accessibility features, and nearby attractions.

Operational Details

The DA2 Bus operates on a fixed schedule, ensuring timely service for passengers traveling between DAMAC Hills and Dubai Studio City. Below is the timetable for the DA2 Bus:

From Dubai Studio City From Amazonia
07:00 07:32
08:18 09:32
09:00 11:32
10:18 13:32
11:00 15:32
12:18 17:32
13:00 19:32
14:18 21:32
15:00  
16:18  
17:00  
18:18  
19:00  
20:18  
21:00  
22:18  

Bus DA2 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or check this link for the DA2 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The DA2 Bus utilizes the Nol Card, Dubai’s unified payment system for public transportation. The fare is AED 3 within one zone, with top-up options available at metro stations, kiosks, and online.

Route Overview

The DA2 Bus operates a looped route connecting DAMAC Hills with Dubai Studio City, providing essential links for daily commuters and leisure travelers. Below is a detailed list of stops along this route:

  1. Dubai Studio City, Operation Office 1 The starting point, serving as a hub for Studio City operations.

  2. Dubai Studio City, Operation Office 2 Another key stop for commuters within Studio City.

  3. Amazonia A residential area within DAMAC Hills, offering scenic surroundings.

  4. Trixis A vibrant community known for its family-friendly environment.

  5. Community Centre A central location catering to shopping and daily needs.

  6. Zinnia A residential cluster featuring modern amenities.

  7. Odora A serene neighborhood, ideal for families and professionals.

  8. Mulberry A popular area within DAMAC Hills, offering lush green spaces.

9.

  1. Amargo A residential area with easy access to key facilities.

  2. Victoria A picturesque community designed for comfortable living.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  1. Dubai Studio City, Operation Office 1 The final stop, completing the loop and providing convenient access to Studio City.

This route ensures efficient connectivity between DAMAC Hills and surrounding areas, accommodating the needs of both regular commuters and occasional travelers. Some other Dubai bus routes you can check out include the DH1 bus route, which runs from Dubai Hills to Equiti Metro Station.

Accessibility and Services

The DA2 Bus is designed with passenger comfort and inclusivity in mind. Key accessibility features include:

  • Ramps and Low Floors: Facilitating easy access for wheelchair users and passengers with strollers.

  • Designated Seating: Reserved seats for the elderly and individuals with special needs.
  • Audio-Visual Aids: Announcements and displays to assist passengers with visual or hearing impairments.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Traveling on the DA2 Bus offers an opportunity to explore several noteworthy locations: 1.

  1. DAMAC Hills: A serene residential community featuring parks, golf courses, and high-end amenities.

  2. Community Centre: A hub for shopping and dining, offering various options for residents and visitors.

  3. Amazonia and Trixis: Picturesque neighborhoods that highlight the greenery and tranquility of DAMAC properties.

Journey Experience

The DA2 bus route from DAMAC Hills to Dubai Studio City offers a long but convenient journey through some of Dubai’s thriving residential and commercial hubs. Starting from the tranquil neighborhoods of DAMAC Hills, like Amazonia and Trixis, the route showcases lush landscapes and modern community living.

Travel Tips for DA2 Bus

  • Plan Ahead: Check the schedule to minimize waiting times, especially during peak hours.

  • Use Nol Cards: Ensure your card is topped up for a hassle-free journey.
  • Explore Attractions: Take advantage of the stops to explore DAMAC Hills’ parks and shopping centers.
  • Travel Off-Peak: Avoid peak hours for a more comfortable experience.

The DA2 Bus offers a reliable and budget-friendly way to travel between DAMAC Hills and Dubai Studio City. With its well-planned route, regular schedule, and modern facilities, the DA2 Bus caters to both daily commuters and those exploring the area. Whether you’re visiting for leisure or heading to work, this service guarantees a comfortable and scenic journey through some of Dubai’s most vibrant communities. Hop on the DA2 Bus for a convenient travel experience!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 10, 2025.
